creator: k_georgiev@deltanews.bg
text:
Hello again, 

If it will be useful now I got the cache size larger than the pool, this is the current status:

ARC: 7713M Total, 1950M MFU, 5343M MRU, 746K Anon, 26M Header, 394M Other
